'''Yetoom Na Uun''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Yetoom system/Legends|Yetoom system]] of the [[Senex sector/Legends|Senex sector]]. Positioned at the [[Sector/Legends|sector's]] edge, Yetoom was a [[Shadowport/Legends|shadowport]] controlled by gangs of [[Senex-Juvex/Legends|Senex-Juvex]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="Atlas" /> and was the headquarters of [[Fargednim P'taan]].<ref name="Children of the Jedi">[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]</ref> It was often visited by disreputable nobles from the Senex and Juvex [[Ancient Houses|Houses]].<ref name="Atlas" />
